Tool Call: retrieve("interaction between talin and amot proteins")

Retrieved Documents: 32 documents

We do not find any explicit mention of an interaction between Talin and Amot proteins in the retrieved documents. While both proteins are implicated in cytoskeletal dynamics and cell-matrix adhesion—Talin being part of integrin-based adhesion complexes and Amot potentially involved in cytoplasmic scaffolding—it remains unsupported by available data to assert a direct interaction. Therefore, I maintain agreement with the prior conclusion that there is no documented interaction between these proteins.\boxed{B}
Based on the retrieved evidence, there is no indication of a direct interaction between Talin and Amot proteins.
